privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. The task involves formatting a historical document about the Erie Canal with 5 real academic citations from authoritative scholarly sources: (1) Bernstein's 'Wedding of the Waters' (W.W. Norton, 2005), a New York Times bestseller on the Erie Canal; (2) Sheriff's 'The Artificial River' (Hill and Wang, 1996), analyzing the Canal's socioeconomic paradoxes; (3) Shaw's 'Erie Water West' (University of Kentucky Press, 1966), a comprehensive 449-page scholarly history; (4) Albion's 'The Rise of New York Port' (Scribner, 1939), covering New York's emergence as a major port; and (5) a shortened citation to Bernstein. All publishers, years, and page numbers have been verified as accurate. The task data is synthetic (programmatically generated in setup_task.sh), not from a public source.
